title: clinopodium selerianum
intro: Clinopodium selerianum, also known as Seler's Clinopodium, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Clinopodium selerianum include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Clinopodium selerianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
